item.description:
What's New

  • Faster, more accurate transcription - Upgraded to an improved, and lighter, speech model
  • Better UX - Prettier in some areas
  • In-app checkout - Purchase flow now opens directly in the app
  • Clearer pricing page - Updated for clarity

Fixes

  • Fixed bottom bar positioning (requested by @eddie_08)
  • Fixed window close behavior (requested by X: @johnway___)
  • Improved permission flow with better error handling
  • License activation improvements (requested by X: @johnway___)
  • Show-in-dock setting + menu bar improvements
  • Music dimming while recording is auto-enabled
